title: Write tests for branch creation resilience
description: Create comprehensive test cases for taskctl start branch creation resilience using TDD approach. Tests must cover: (1) existing branch detection and cleanup, (2) existing worktree detection and cleanup, (3) clean state normal operation. Tests should verify graceful handling of retry scenarios.
acceptance_criteria: Test file contains test cases for all three scenarios: existing branch, existing worktree, clean state. Tests use project conventions (bun test framework). Tests currently fail as feature is not implemented. Tests verify start command handles edge cases correctly.
